owner_or_contact_info: Skladan  Architecture Ltd. DBA: Skladan Architecture LTD; Aurora Custom Homes Ltd
applicant: Skladan  Architecture Ltd. DBA: Skladan Architecture LTD
description:
BP for DP-2024-00939 (Site & Building 1 - Part 9)

To construct a Multiple Dwelling "Multiplex" consisting of two 3-storey two-unit buildings at the front (Building 1 & Building 2; $1,200,000 each) and two 2-storey one-unit buildings (Building 3 & Building 4; $800,000 each) at rear for a total of 6 dwelling units, with total 6 dwelling units and 6 surface parking spaces at rear, having vehicular access from the lane.

Front Buildings to be sprinklered to NFPA 13D; Rear Buildings to NFPA 13R.

Sch A, Struct B, & Geotech B are submitted.

***REVIEWED UNDER VBBL 2019 WITH AMENDMENTS EFFECTIVE ON FEB 28, 2025***

Building 2 at southeast under BP-2025-01506
Building 3 at northwest under BP-2025-01507
Building 4 at southwest under BP-2025-01508

address: 1688 SW MARINE DRIVE, Vancouver, BC V6P 6A9
specific_location: 1688 SW Marine Drive - Primary site address
description:
To develop a Multiple Dwelling "Multiplex" with one three-storey 1 unit front building, one three-storey 2 unit front building, one two-storey one unit rear building and one two storey, two unit rear building; a total of 6 dwelling units and a detached car garage accessed through the lane.

All work is to conform to the archaeological monitoring program identified by Arrowstone Archaeological Research and Consulting Ltd. in the “Interim Results of the Archaeological Impact Assessment (AIA) of a Proposed Multi-Unit (Multiplex) Residential Development at 1688 SW Marine Drive, Vancouver, B.C. within and in proximity to Site DhRs-19.” under Heritage Conservation Act Inspection Permit 2025-0033, Alteration Permit 2025-0274, TWN-24434-24289, MIB-2024-245-AIA, SHIP 2024-299. All subsequent management recommendations resulting from ongoing field results during construction and the testing program must be followed. This may result in amendments to this permit.
